title: Roles & permissions
subtitle: Configure which permissions each built-in role has. Changes take effect on the next request.
superAdminLocked: The Super Admin role has every permission and cannot be edited.
thresholdHint: Leave blank for no limit. Documents above this amount route to a higher-tier approver.
invalidThreshold: Threshold must be a non-negative number or blank.

approval.editorHint: Set the maximum amount this role can approve before a document escalates to a higher-tier approver. Leave a field blank for no limit.
approval.empty: No approval-aware permissions are enabled for this role yet. Enable them under Role permissions first.
